title: Read Me
body:
Welcome to Mundo 95.

Something is keeping this machine from shutting down. Poke around the
desktop, open what you can, and find a way to power it off.

Good luck.

title: My Notes
body: Scratchpad. Type anything you like here.

title: network
Readme
body:
Floppy Disk Driver 1.0

This driver lets Mundo 95 read and write 3.5" floppy disks.

If a disk is not recognised, check that it is inserted the right way up
and that the write-protect tab is closed, then try again.
